steps.t: The monuments are in Imlad Balchorth in front of the large lake. Oflár has asked you to bring the tincture to Imlad Balchorth and use it on the monume…
Oflár is back at the dwarf-outpost of Myrkworth. You dispersed some fell spirits and slew the wights who came to defend the obelisk, but there was lit…
